flags.concern: final-video reminder state: removing `finalVideoShotIds` and `onShotGroupDismissFinalVideo` without a replacement suppression path regresses pinned-group badge behavior. In the current repo, `TimelineEditor` dismisses the final-video id before switching (`dismissFinalVideo(finalVideo.id)`) and `resolveFinalVideoShotIds()` filters both dismissed ids and already-on-timeline generations before `TimelineCanvas` shows the badge. If `hasFinalVideo` becomes only `finalVideoMap.has(group.shotId)`, pinned groups that are already in `mode: 'video'` will still keep the reminder badge/button forever.
flags.evidence: `src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineEditor.tsx:126-154` computes `finalVideoShotIds` from `dismissedFinalVideoIds` and current timeline generation ids; `src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineEditor.tsx:643-655` calls `dismissFinalVideo(finalVideo.id)` on switch and dismiss; `src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineCanvas.tsx:470,820-838` uses that derived flag to decide whether to render the final-video badge.

flags.concern: timeline-editor supporting tests: the plan only updates `useShotGroups.test.ts`, but the repository also has tests that directly depend on the APIs being removed. Dropping `resolveFinalVideoShotIds`, `finalVideoShotIds`, `onShotGroupPin`, and `isPinned` will leave `TimelineEditor.test.ts` and `TimelineCanvas.test.tsx` broken unless they are explicitly updated or removed.
flags.evidence: `src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineEditor.test.ts:6,117-172` imports and tests `resolveFinalVideoShotIds`; `src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineCanvas.test.tsx:46-50,85-89,303-390` types against `finalVideoShotIds`/`onShotGroupPin` and asserts suggested-vs-pinned UI via `isPinned`.
